info.title: MemMachine API
info.description: Architectural Memory Systems for AI Agents. Specialized in episodic and semantic memory management with strict namespace isolation. Lab-verified against Python v2 routers.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Lifecycle management for isolated memory namespaces.

tags.name: Memories: Core
tags.description: Ingestion and retrieval for all memory types.

tags.name: Memories: Semantic
tags.description: Deep management of semantic features, categories, and tags.

tags.name: Configuration: Resources
tags.description: Management of Embedders, LLMs, and Rerankers.

tags.name: Configuration: System
tags.description: Global and project-level memory rail settings.

post.description: Returns a global inventory of all active memory namespaces (org_id/project_id pairs). NOTE: This is a global discovery endpoint. Unlike other 'list' operations in this API, it does not require a namespace scope (org_id/project_id) and therefore accepts an empty request body.
Ingest messages into episodic or semantic memory rails based on project config.
Retrieve the episode count for a project.
Delete episodic memories in a project.
Delete semantic memories in a project.
Add a semantic feature to a project.
Get a semantic feature by ID.
Create a new semantic set type.
List all semantic set types.
Delete a semantic set type.
Get or create a semantic set ID.
List all semantic sets.
Configure a semantic set.
Get a semantic category by ID.
Add a semantic category template to a set type.
List semantic category templates for a set type.
Disable a semantic category for a set.
Get set IDs associated with a category.
Delete a semantic category.
Add a tag to a semantic category.
Delete a semantic tag.
Get episodic memory configuration for a project.
Configure episodic memory for a project.
Get short-term memory configuration for a project.
Configure short-term memory for a project.
Get long-term memory configuration for a project.
Configure long-term memory for a project.

get.description: Health check endpoint for container orchestration.

put.description: Update episodic and/or semantic memory configuration.

post.description: Add a new language model configuration.
Retry building a failed embedder.
Retry building a failed language model.
Retry building a failed reranker.

producer.description: ID of the entity producing the message.

UpdateFeatureSpec.description: Metadata-driven update for a specific semantic feature.

filter.description: Key-value pairs to filter by metadata.
